title: Command Adapter Layer & YAML Integration
description: Implement command adapter layer with pluggable registry for OS-specific commands. Create unified os_cmd interface that delegates to OS-specific adapters based on detected OS. Support YAML/JSON configuration for command mapping and include built-in adapters for domestic OS distributions.

criteria: os_cmd('info') returns structured system info on any registered OS
Command adapter registry correctly routes to OS-specific implementation
YAML config can override default command mappings for any OS
Unregistered OS falls back to generic Linux adapter

files.target: YAML config for OS command mappings

implementation: Create CommandAdapter ABC with execute(cmd_name, **kwargs) method
Implement CommandRegistry with register(), get_adapter(), and set_os() methods
Create os_cmd(cmd_name, **kwargs) function that routes to current OS adapter
Implement GenericLinuxAdapter with standard Linux commands (ls, cat, df, etc.)
Implement DomesticOSAdapter extending GenericLinuxAdapter with OS-specific overrides
Create YAML config mapping commands to OS-specific implementations
Add fallback mechanism: if OS has no specific adapter, use generic Linux commands

reference.pattern: Follow existing adapter patterns in src/layers/bmc/clients.py
